name: qclaw-lite
description: Electron desktop setup wizard for OpenClaw.
author: 秋芝2046

scripts.package:linux: npm run build:app && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --linux --publish never
scripts.package:linux:appimage: npm run build:app && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --linux AppImage --publish never
scripts.package:linux:deb: npm run build:app && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --linux deb --publish never
scripts.package:linux:rpm: npm run build:app && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --linux rpm --publish never
scripts.package:mac:dir: npm run check:mac:release-env -- --allow-placeholder-publish --skip-notarize && npm run build:app && QCLAW_SKIP_NOTARIZE=1 node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --mac --arm64 --x64 dir --publish never
scripts.package:mac:dir:arm64: npm run check:mac:release-env -- --allow-placeholder-publish --skip-notarize && npm run build:app && QCLAW_SKIP_NOTARIZE=1 node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --mac --arm64 dir --publish never
scripts.package:mac:dir:x64: npm run check:mac:release-env -- --allow-placeholder-publish --skip-notarize && npm run build:app && QCLAW_SKIP_NOTARIZE=1 node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --mac --x64 dir --publish never
scripts.package:mac: npm run check:mac:release-env -- --allow-placeholder-publish --skip-notarize && npm run build:app && QCLAW_SKIP_NOTARIZE=1 node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --mac --arm64 --x64 --publish never
scripts.package:mac:arm64: npm run check:mac:release-env -- --allow-placeholder-publish --skip-notarize && npm run build:app && QCLAW_SKIP_NOTARIZE=1 node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --mac --arm64 --publish never
scripts.package:mac:x64: npm run check:mac:release-env -- --allow-placeholder-publish --skip-notarize && npm run build:app && QCLAW_SKIP_NOTARIZE=1 node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --mac --x64 --publish never
scripts.package:mac:notarized: npm run check:mac:release-env -- --allow-placeholder-publish && npm run build:app && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --mac --arm64 --x64 --publish never
scripts.package:mac:notarized:arm64: npm run check:mac:release-env -- --allow-placeholder-publish && npm run build:app && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --mac --arm64 --publish never
scripts.package:mac:notarized:x64: npm run check:mac:release-env -- --allow-placeholder-publish && npm run build:app && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --mac --x64 --publish never
scripts.release:mac: npm run check:mac:release-env && npm run build:app && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --mac --arm64 --x64 --publish never
scripts.release:mac:arm64: npm run check:mac:release-env && npm run build:app && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --mac --arm64 --publish never
scripts.release:mac:x64: npm run check:mac:release-env && npm run build:app && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --mac --x64 --publish never
